heading: Tenders

| Licence is proposed to be offered for unsettled retail vend of Kaman Chowmuhani Foreign Liquor Shop,Kaman Chowmuhani , Agartala under West Tripura District. | Licence is proposed to be offered for unsettled retail vend of Kaman Chowmuhani Foreign Liquor Shop,Kaman Chowmuhani , Agartala under West Tripura District for the financial year 2019-2020. | 25/10/2019 | 25/11/2019 | |
